title: Housing, method of manufacturing the same, and electronic device including the same
abstract: A method for manufacturing a housing, comprising: laminating a first deposition layer on a preform; laminating an intermediate layer on the first deposition layer; laminating a second deposition layer on the intermediate layer; applying a color paint layer on the second deposition layer; delaminating at least some of the color paint layer and the second deposition layer to form at least one delaminated area; and forming a printing layer in the delaminated area, wherein the first deposition layer is visible through at least some areas of the printing layer.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A method for manufacturing a housing, comprising: laminating a first layer and a second layer on a preform; and delaminating at least a portion of the second layer to form a delaminated area. The method of claim 1, wherein the first layer and the second layer have different colors. The method of claim 1, wherein the first layer comprises a deposition layer and a color paint layer laminated on the deposition layer. The method of claim 1, wherein the first layer is formed of at least one of a Sn-based material, a Ti-based material, a Cr-based material, and an Al-based material. The method of claim 1, wherein the second layer is delaminated by using at least one of a fiber (diode) laser, a YAG laser, a gas laser, and an ultraviolet ray laser. The method of claim 1, further comprising: forming a printing layer in the delaminated area. The method of claim 6, wherein the first layer is visible through at least some areas of the printing layer. The method of claim 6, wherein the printing layer is formed via at least one of Direct Digital Printing (DDP), gravure printing, thermal transfer printing, water transfer printing, pad printing, and silk printing. The method of claim 6, further comprising forming a primer layer in the delaminated area and a remaining portion of the second layer, wherein the primer layer is interposed between the printing layer and the first layer. The method of claim 6, wherein the first layer includes a color paint layer, and the color paint layer is visible through at least some areas of the printing layer. The method of claim 1, further comprising forming a top layer over the first layer and the second layer. The method of claim 1, further comprising forming a printing layer onto the first layer, wherein the printing layer is formed before the second layer is laminated, and the printing layer is exposed  as a result of the second layer being delaminated. The method of claim 1, wherein the preform is formed of a light transmitting material, the first layer is formed on a first surface of the preform, and the second layer is formed on a second surface of the preform. The method of claim 13, wherein the housing includes a protection cover arranged to protect at least a portion of an electronic device, or wherein the housing includes at least one of a case frame that defines an external appearance of an electronic device, and a battery cover that is installable on the case frame. An electronic device including the housing manufactured by the method of claim 1.
